description: NOTE: commercial fields on this entity (invoiceAmount, taxAmount, paymentTerms, netPayable) are hiddenForRoles ["quality"] per axiom A17. The supplier invoice captured into AP against a PO (diagram 09): its lines carry tax as a first-class attribute, its documents (invoice, packing list, certificate of origin, AWB/BL, Bayan, health cert, DG declaration) are checked for completeness, it is screened for duplicates on the supplier + invoice-number + amount key, normalized to base currency, matched two-way or three-way, approved (SoD: the receiver of the goods is not the approver), and released as a net payable to payment. Rejected and confirmed-duplicate invoices exit without a payable.
lifecycleEnum: InvoiceStatus (captured -> on-hold(duplicate) | matched | exception -> approved -> released | rejected)

fields.name: identifier
fields.label: Invoice Ref.
fields.validation: configurable internal pattern; unique; immutable once captured
fields.purpose: Stable internal key that ties the invoice to its match result, GR/IR clearing, credit/debit note and payment, so the payable is traceable end to end; distinct from the supplier's own invoiceNumber, which is part of the duplicate key.

fields.name: invoiceNumber
fields.label: Supplier Invoice No.
fields.validation: non-empty; part of the duplicate detection key (supplier + invoiceNumber + amount)
fields.purpose: The supplier's own invoice reference; one of the three components of the duplicate-invoice signature, the standard AP control that stops the same invoice being paid twice.

fields.name: supplierId
fields.label: Supplier
fields.validation: supplier exists; inherited from the PO; first component of the duplicate key
fields.purpose: Names the payee and scopes the external submission form to the supplier's own records; the first component of the duplicate-invoice key and the pivot for the creditor ledger and DPO.

fields.name: poId
fields.label: Purchase Order
fields.validation: resolves to an open PO; not null; the match anchor
fields.purpose: Anchors the invoice to the order it bills so the match compares against PO agreed price and lines; GRN existence on the PO line then selects three-way vs two-way matching (axiom A8).

fields.name: invoiceDate
fields.label: Invoice Date
fields.validation: valid date; tenant timezone; display DD-MMM-YYYY
fields.purpose: The supplier's invoice date; the basis for the payment-terms due date (net 30/60/90) and the payables-aging / DPO clock.

fields.name: currency
fields.label: Currency
fields.validation: a configured currency master; defaults to the PO currency
fields.purpose: The invoice transaction currency; the base-currency sibling is FX-converted from it so the match tolerance, thresholds and aging are normalized (axiom A12), and it carries the realized-FX basis between PO date and payment date.

fields.name: lines
fields.label: Invoice Lines
fields.validation: array of {poLineId, description, quantity > 0, unitPrice >= 0, taxCodeId, taxableAmount, taxAmount}; poLineId resolves to a line of poId
fields.purpose: The billed lines the match reconciles: price against PO agreed price, quantity against GRN accepted quantity (three-way) or PO quantity (two-way), each carrying tax as a first-class attribute so the amount check is tax-inclusive (axiom A8).

fields.name: amount
fields.label: Net Amount
fields.validation: > 0; equals sum of line taxableAmount; third component of the duplicate key
fields.purpose: The pre-tax invoice value; the third component of the duplicate-invoice signature (supplier + invoiceNumber + amount) and the base for the tax-exclusive payable before tax is added.

fields.name: taxAmount
fields.label: Tax Amount
fields.validation: >= 0; equals sum of line taxAmount; reverse-charge / import VAT flagged for imports
fields.purpose: The total tax on the invoice; the match is amount-inclusive-of-tax so this must reconcile, with reverse-charge flagged for imports and recoverable input-VAT/GST credit tracked (Tax/Compliance resolves a tax-mismatch).

fields.name: totalInclTax
fields.label: Total (Incl. Tax)
fields.validation: > 0; = amount + taxAmount; reconciles to the lines
fields.purpose: The tax-inclusive invoice total the match compares against the expected total within the absolute tolerance band; the figure normalized to base and posted to the creditor ledger as the gross payable.

fields.name: totalInclTaxInBase
fields.label: Total Incl. Tax (Base)
fields.validation: FX-converted from totalInclTax; graceful degradation to original on FX failure (never throws)
fields.purpose: The base-currency tax-inclusive total that drives the match tolerance, approval threshold and payables analytics (axiom A12); the single comparable money figure across currencies for the invoice.

fields.name: documents
fields.label: Documents
fields.validation: array of {docType in [invoice, packingList, certificateOfOrigin, awbBl, bayan, healthCert, dgDeclaration], file}; invoice mandatory; packingList conditional (goods); certificateOfOrigin/awbBl/bayan conditional (import); healthCert conditional (food RM import); dgDeclaration conditional (dangerous goods)
fields.purpose: The supporting document package whose completeness is verified at capture; the invoice document is always mandatory, the rest are conditional on goods/import/food/DG so the right evidence backs the payable (ISO 7.5).

fields.name: duplicateKey
fields.label: Duplicate Key
fields.validation: derived; a match against another invoice's key routes to the duplicate hold (no payable while open)
fields.purpose: The three-key duplicate-invoice signature (supplier + invoice number + amount); the standard AP control that holds a coincident invoice before matching so a confirmed duplicate never posts a payable.

fields.name: reverseCharge
fields.label: Reverse Charge / Import VAT
fields.mandatoryCondition: set true for imports subject to reverse-charge / import VAT
fields.validation: true flags reverse-charge / import VAT for the tax reconciliation
fields.purpose: Flags an import where the buyer self-accounts the tax (reverse-charge / import VAT) so the tax-mismatch resolver reconciles it correctly and recoverable input credit is tracked, rather than expecting supplier-charged tax.

fields.name: approvedBy
fields.label: Approved By
fields.mandatoryCondition: set when the invoice is approved before accounts
fields.validation: set on approve; the approver must not be the receiver of the same goods (SoD)
fields.purpose: Records who approved the matched (or note-adjusted) invoice before accounts; SoD requires the approver is not the goods receiver and a buyer who received the goods may not approve the invoice (axiom A6).

fields.name: captureDate
fields.label: Capture Date
fields.validation: now() on capture into AP; immutable
fields.purpose: The system timestamp the invoice entered AP; orders the duplicate check and match, dates the GR/IR clearing, and anchors the audit/SSE entry (axiom A13).

fields.name: status
fields.label: Status
fields.validation: on-hold for a duplicate; matched/exception from the match; approved before accounts; released to payment; rejected returns to supplier (no payable)
fields.purpose: The invoice lifecycle position; only an approved-and-released invoice posts a payable and (for three-way lines) clears GR/IR, while rejected and confirmed-duplicate invoices exit without a payable.

invariants: A6 SoD: the goods receiver is not the invoice approver; a buyer who received may not approve
A8 GRN existence selects THREE_WAY vs TWO_WAY; match reconciles amounts including tax
A12 base-currency normalization; FX never throws
A13 audit + SSE on every committed change
duplicate detection key is supplier + invoice number + amount; a confirmed duplicate never posts a payable
a cleared three-way match relieves GR/IR; two-way posts the payable directly
